Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Haven]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Haven is an important world.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Haven is a vault-world containing secure Abidan facilities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Makiel stored twelve of his experimental scythe failures in Haven.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Haven is the prison-world of the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Silverlords had served a term in Haven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Haven is a prison-world that resembles an iron prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Haven is a location that can be breached.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — The Mad King broke out of the depths of Haven.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Haven is a place where Ozriel could be tossed.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Haven is a place where Li Markuth was imprisoned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Haven may not be secure.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
